channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-03 12:03 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Deployment of the CAS500-2 satellite confirmed
item.description: Deployment of the CAS500-2 satellite confirmed

item.title: @elonmusk: Falcon 9’s first stage has landed on Landing Zone 4
item.description: Falcon 9’s first stage has landed on Landing Zone 4

item.title: @elonmusk: Ancient cultures were extremely violent, not “peace-loving ecologists” at all!
item.description: Ancient cultures were extremely violent, not “peace-loving ecologists” at all!

item.title: @elonmusk: For decades, prehistorical evidence was forced through a left-wing theory filter: primitive communis...
item.description: For decades, prehistorical evidence was forced through a left-wing theory filter: primitive communism, the noble savage, and the myth that violence came from hierarchy, property, and “the system.” But the bones kept talking, and they disagree with the left.

item.title: @elonmusk: The left is what Wikipedia sees the world through. You can get a sense of what it what it would look...
item.description: The left is what Wikipedia sees the world through. You can get a sense of what it what it would look like to change that lens if you go to@Grokipedia. If you take the same article on Wikipedia and Grokipedia, they're gonna look really different. Even if you disagree with what's written on Grokipedia and agree with what is on Wikipedia, you're still gonna see that there are two ways to present the issue and Wikipedia is not the way. It's not neutral. (@AshleyRindsberg//@TheFP)

item.title: @elonmusk: The Slanic salt mine in Romania is the closest thing to the Mines of Moria on Earth
item.description: The Slanic salt mine in Romania is the closest thing to the Mines of Moria on Earth

item.title: @elonmusk: LA woman: “After driving someone to the airport, came back home, 3 homeless people I saw defecating,...
item.description: LA woman: “After driving someone to the airport, came back home, 3 homeless people I saw defecating, like not even like privately defecating, pulling down their pants, bu*thole out to the street, defecating. So, you know what? I'm voting for Spencer Pratt now”

item.title: @elonmusk: 🚨 WOW! Los Angeles mayor candidate Spencer Pratt has infuriated leftist candidate Nithya Raman after...
item.description: 🚨 WOW! Los Angeles mayor candidate Spencer Pratt has infuriated leftist candidate Nithya Raman after he recorded outside her MANSION to point out how out of TOUCH she is "Here is where Nithya Raman's $3 million MANSION sits. They don't have to live in the MESS they've created." 🔥 RAMAN: "Filming outside my home, where I live with my young children, feels unnecessary and reckless." Cry more,@spencerprattjust exposed the TRUTH! Wake up and save your city, LA!

item.title: @elonmusk: Why Critical Thinking Is Dead - Warren Smith Watch the full episode with@WTSmith17right here on X.
item.description: Why Critical Thinking Is Dead - Warren Smith Watch the full episode with@WTSmith17right here on X.

item.title: @elonmusk: Starlink now in Papua New Guinea! 🇵🇬
item.description: Starlink now in Papua New Guinea! 🇵🇬
